title: Today Workout
rawText:
STRENGTH (lunge)
Back rack reverse lunges
4 sets x 10 reps (alt') @R.P.E 7-8
In between, 3 sets of:
10/10 seated shoulder external rotations

METCON (Medium)
[03:00 min AMRAP , 01:00 min REST]
x 4 rounds:
4-6-8-10-12- - ➞
Single Kettlebell Snatch
Weighted box step up
* 5 burpees after each round
◁ WEIGHT: 16/24kg ▷
* Continue from where you stopped
** Split the snatch reps however you want
